title: festuca dyris
intro: Festuca dyris, also known as Dyris fescue, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Festuca dyris include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Festuca dyris are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
